chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.372 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2195/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection and reply as at “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.2196/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 10.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Imran Khawaja, advocate a/w applicant/accused ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Adnan Abid son of Abid Hussain has received call up notice issued by SIP FIA Bahawalpur, Punjab in Enquiry No.E-30/2025, AHTC, FIA against the applicant. Learned advocate for applicant submits that still no FIR has been lodged against the applicant but the applicant feels apprehension of his arrest in the alleged enquiry and he seeks some protection in order to enable him to appear before the Enquiry Officer. In view of above, applicant may appear before the Enquiry Officer concerned but he may not be arrested until and unless registration of any FIR against him. The instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
